texts: Name: Verify Numerical Reasoning | Description: Measures ability to interpret numerical data, graphs and tables. Used for graduate, professional and managerial roles requiring data analysis. | Test types: A | Job levels: Graduate, Professional, Manager | Duration: 17 minutes | Details: numerical reasoning numbers graphs charts data tables quantitative analysis graduate manager professional

Name: Verify Inductive Reasoning | Description: Assesses ability to identify patterns and logical rules in abstract information. Name: Verify Deductive Reasoning | Description: Measures ability to draw logical conclusions from rules or premises.
